structure_sections.target_fill: I just built an AI that can read your mind
And now I'm piling it with meta
When you put out any piece of content you have no idea how people will react
I realized comp neural pipelines are the quickest way to fix that
We simulate the neural activity of your ICP after watching content and then we convert that neural activity back to statistics actually usable by creatives
Imagine the order you see reels your YouTube homepage and the way products are lined up on Amazon all being pretested on how you would react to that content
If you believe in our mission we're currently looking for interns and partners

structure_rationale: The repeating structure across all inspiration reels is a clear hook, exposition, development, and call to action, directly mapping onto the target transcript order.
content_source_patterns: screen recording of the subject's website
screenshot of the subject's social media profile
stock / archival footage tied to a claim
close-up of a relevant prop or artifact

- reel 1: 82.8s, 58 shots, cuts/sec=0.69, text=97%, SFX=136/min
- reel 2: 48.1s, 41 shots, cuts/sec=0.83, text=98%, SFX=100/min
- reel 3: 98.9s, 75 shots, cuts/sec=0.75, text=96%, SFX=116/min
